title: canthium dicoccum var. umbellatum
intro: Canthium dicoccum var. umbellatum is a plant species that belongs to the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. It is also known as 'Asthma Plant' due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. Canthium dicoccum var. umbellatum can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant material in a solvent, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
